features.name: xor_feedback_register_with_reset
features.description: Code should include an edge-triggered always block with reset that performs XOR feedback (register <= register ^ constant) on a signal
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (reset) cnt <= 1; else cnt <= cnt ^ 1; end

features.name: duplicate_xor_feedback_registers
features.description: Code should include two parallel registers that perform identical XOR feedback operations but on different signals (cnt_0 <= cnt_0 ^ 1 and cnt_1 <= cnt_1 ^ 1)
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) begin if (reset) cnt__0 <= 1; else cnt__0 <= cnt__0 ^ 1; end
always @(posedge clk) begin if (reset) cnt__1 <= 1; else cnt__1 <= cnt__1 ^ 1; end
